failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Solid formation or debris accumulation in BPR valve
failure_modes.mitigation: Regular maintenance and inspection of BPR valve
Ensure accurate temperature control and monitoring

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=7.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Perform thermal stability test on TBAB/EG solvent at 120°C for 24 hours
Inspect BPR valve for blockages after 10 hours of continuous operation
